content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 2, 2026, focused on addressing configuration inconsistencies regarding environment variables. Work was initiated to ensure the `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` setting is handled uniformly across the plugin's voice and text modules.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#50](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/50) fix(env): respect DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY env var via DISCORD_DEFAULTS

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None*

## NEW ISSUES
### Configuration Consistency
* [#49](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/issues/49) voice.ts reads `DISCORD_AUTO_REPLY` via `runtime.getSetting` directly, bypassing the established `discordSettings.autoReply` path used by the text module.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None*
